stalePRs.title: chore(deps-dev): bump the build-tools group across 1 directory with 2 updates

remediation.intent: Review 1 stale Dependabot PR(s) in bonnie-wee-plot

acceptanceCriteria: Each stale Dependabot PR is merged or closed
